name: getFoundryCampaignInfo
description: Query campaign information from Foundry VTT through the Foundry bridge plugin. Use this for campaign canon, journals, world lore, active scenes, NPC information, and other Foundry-backed data instead of markdown files when Foundry is the authoritative source.

query.description: What campaign information is needed from Foundry.

scope.description: Optional search scope hint for the plugin, for example any, journal, scene, actor, item, or table.

limit.description: Optional maximum number of results to return when the plugin supports multiple matches.

channelKey.description: Optional override for the Foundry bridge channel key. Normally taken from toolsconfig.getFoundryBridge.channelKey.
